en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 24–30 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 436 kcal/day, peaking 1,114 on Friday's swim block. Tuesday (Jun 30) just starting.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −850 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Tuesday (Jun 30) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Friday's swim block was the week's peak
en.i1: Friday stacked a 2.1 km pool set (avg 131 / max 158, the week's hardest swim) with an 873 m open-water swim — 3h36 combined and 1,511 active kcal, more than any other day this week.
en.i2t: Two strength days anchored the block
en.i2: Strength Thu and Sat ran avg HR 113 / 108, maxes 154 / 147 over 74 and 53 min. Hevy still hasn't synced this week's lifts, so lifted volume — and any new per-set HR peaks — aren't in yet; the next refresh will fill them.
en.i3: Monday's pool intervals (500 + 8×200 + 100, 2.2 km, avg HR 130 / max 157, 773 kcal in 61 min) put a sharp aerobic stimulus on top of the strength work before today's rest.
en.i4t: Recovery is solid, sleep is the limiter
en.i4: This morning HRV is 48 (+7 over the 7-day avg of 41), RHR 53 and stress 13 — the autonomic markers stayed strong even after a short 6h05 night (score 79). The body has absorbed the block; the only soft spot is sleep duration, not load.
en.rec: A balanced week: two strength days (Thu, Sat, avg HR 113 / 108), Friday's double swim (2.1 km pool + 873 m open water, 3h36 / 1,511 kcal) as the standout, and Monday's 2.2 km pool intervals (avg 130 / max 157, 773 kcal) capping it. Wednesday and Sunday were full rest; active burn totalled 3,055 kcal across the seven days. Recovery dipped at the weekend (RHR 57, HRV 31 on Sat) then reset — Monday's sleep was 8h07 / score 89 — before last night came up short at 6h05 (score 79), though HRV held at 48. Today's plan is a hack squat: you're recovered for it, keep the warm-up long and top sets controlled after the short night. Next 72h tracks the plan — Tue hack squat, Wed swim intervals, Thu squat. This week's Hevy lifts still haven't synced (tonnage and per-set peaks pending). No meals logged after Jun 14, so intake shows the assumed 2,000 plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-24 → 2026-06-30 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 2 treninga snage · Hevy volumen u tijeku
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 24.–30.6. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 436 kcal/dan, vrhunac 1.114 na petkovom plivanju. Utorak (30.6.) tek počinje.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −850 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Utorak (30.6.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Petkovo plivanje bilo je vrhunac tjedna
hr.i1: Petak je spojio bazenskih 2,1 km (prosj. 131 / maks 158, najteže plivanje tjedna) s plivanjem na otvorenom 873 m — ukupno 3h36 i 1.511 aktivnih kcal, više nego ijedan drugi dan.
hr.i2t: Dva dana snage nosila su blok
hr.i2: Strength čet i sub: prosj. puls 113 / 108, maks 154 / 147 kroz 74 i 53 min. Hevy još nije sinkronizirao dizanja ovog tjedna, pa volumen — i novi puls po seriji — još nisu uneseni; sljedeći refresh će ih popuniti.
hr.i3: Ponedjeljkovi bazenski intervali (500 + 8×200 + 100, 2,2 km, prosj. puls 130 / maks 157, 773 kcal u 61 min) dodali su oštar aerobni podražaj na rad snage prije današnjeg odmora.
hr.i4t: Oporavak je solidan, san je ograničenje
hr.i4: Jutros je HRV 48 (+7 iznad 7-dnevnog prosjeka 41), RHR 53 i stres 13 — autonomni pokazatelji ostali su jaki čak i nakon kratke noći od 6h05 (ocjena 79). Tijelo je apsorbiralo blok; jedina slaba točka je trajanje sna, ne opterećenje.
hr.rec: Uravnotežen tjedan: dva dana snage (čet, sub, prosj. puls 113 / 108), petkovo dvostruko plivanje (2,1 km bazen + 873 m otvorena voda, 3h36 / 1.511 kcal) kao istaknuto, te ponedjeljkovi bazenski intervali 2,2 km (prosj. 130 / maks 157, 773 kcal) kao završnica. Srijeda i nedjelja bili su potpuni odmor; aktivna potrošnja ukupno 3.055 kcal kroz sedam dana. Oporavak je pao za vikend (RHR 57, HRV 31 u sub) pa se resetirao — ponedjeljkov san bio je 8h07 / ocjena 89 — prije nego što je sinoć ispao kratak na 6h05 (ocjena 79), iako se HRV zadržao na 48. Današnji plan je hack squat: oporavljen si za njega, produži zagrijavanje i drži vršne serije pod kontrolom nakon kratke noći. Sljedeća 72h prati plan — uto hack squat, sri intervali, čet squat. Dizanja ovog tjedna još nisu sinkronizirana (tonaža i puls po seriji čekaju). Nema zabilježenih obroka nakon 14.6., pa unos prikazuje pretpostavljenih 2.000.
